title: Sales Manager
description:
Dailymotion is the leading video discovery destination & technology that learns about your tastes over time, constantly surfacing the best, most relevant content on the web. Our mission is to provide the best video user experience for consumers on the market, connecting publishers and advertisers to engaged viewers who turn to Dailymotion for their daily fix of the most compelling music, entertainment, news and sports content around.



Through partnerships with the world’s leading publishers and content creators, A+E, Discovery, Hearst, Penske Media, Universal Music Group, Vogue, GQ, NASCAR, Sports Illustrated, VICE and more, Dailymotion commands 3 billion monthly pageviews across its mobile app, desktop and connected TV experiences. Dailymotion is owned by Vivendi, one of the largest mass-media corporations in the world.



At Dailymotion, we‘re storytellers. We build the best place for people to enjoy the videos that matter. We do this through utilizing and developing cutting-edge technology and pushing the envelope to bring discoverable stories to life through premium content from the world’s best publishers. We do this by helping these publishers grow their audiences and monetize their content, their way.



Dailymotion is proud to be an equal employment opportunity and affirmative action employer. We value inclusion and we want you to help us thrive for a more diverse community.





Job Description



Job Description



· In collaboration with the Head of Sales, you will help define the sales strategy and drive execution revenue with top advertisers and local agencies.



· You will ensure that Dailymotion is front of mind with clients and part of their core media mix; build relations across partners, ensure key stakeholders know and understand our proposition, and aim to develop a local business.



· You will maximize the client media investment – by working closely with the agency plan team to deliver the numbers locally.



· Ensure Dailymotion is in all core media plans, activation budgets, big events (eg sports) or seasonal opportunities, and new Dailymotion innovations.



· You will be responsible for providing direct sales, programmatic and creative solutions to brands. Manage pipeline, revenue forecasts, and sales activity using Salesforce.com for maximum efficiency and visibility.



· You will report to the Regional Head of Sales.



In addition, you will



 * Serve as an industry expert in order to drive vertical and client success by developing leadership with advertisers.
 * Create and deliver consultative sales presentations using industry knowledge, market trends, insights, and Dailymotion branding solutions.
 * Drive external and internal market knowledge and insights.
 * Develop proactive engagement with industry committees and conferences.

10% travel to customers or events as necessary





Qualifications



Qualifications



 * 2-4 years previous experience.
 * Strong understanding and background in several verticals (CPG, Retail, Finance, Automotive…).
 * Ability to build relationships with top marketing/media decision-makers.
 * Proven experience working with media agencies and direct clients.
 * Excellent communication and presentation skills.
 * Knowledge of online video, digital industry, and programmatic.
 * Proven leadership ability to influence, develop, and empower colleagues to achieve objectives with a team approach.
 * Be a Dailymotion brand ambassador at industry events.
 * Fluent in Spanish and English, with French (Optional).
 * You will work based in Madrid

title: React Frontend Developer
description:
Desde Shakers estamos trabajando con una empresa tecnológica del sector health & care, con base en Barcelona, que desarrolla soluciones digitales para mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas y optimizar la gestión de servicios asistenciales.




La compañía se encuentra en un momento clave de crecimiento tras haber cerrado recientemente una ronda Serie B, y ha activado un ambicioso plan de hiring para reforzar su equipo técnico.




👉 La colaboración puede comenzar en modalidad freelance durante unos meses, con posibilidad real de incorporación in-house a medio plazo.




Stack principal: React / Next.js / Tailwind / State Management




🎯 Tu rol




Como Frontend Developer, serás responsable de construir interfaces modernas, mantenibles y performantes, trabajando sobre una base sólida de componentes, estado global y manejo eficiente de datos asíncronos.

Trabajarás muy de cerca con backend, team lead y otros perfiles técnicos, participando activamente en decisiones de arquitectura y evolución del producto.




🛠️ Responsabilidades




 * Desarrollo de interfaces con React y Next.js
 * Implementación de layouts y estilos con Tailwind CSS
 * Gestión de estado global con Zustand o Redux
 * Manejo de datos asíncronos con React Query o TanStack Query
 * Consumo de APIs REST
 * Escritura de componentes reutilizables y bien estructurados
 * Participación activa en code reviews
 * Colaborar con backend y team leader en decisiones técnicas




🧪 Stack tecnológico




 * React
 * Next.js
 * Tailwind CSS
 * Zustand o Redux
 * React Query / TanStack Query
 * Git




🌍 ¿Tengo que ir a la oficina?




No, el proyecto es 100% remoto, aunque sí nos gusta vernos las caras de vez en cuando, así que contamos con alguna visita puntual a las oficinas de Barcelona.




🎯 Foco en




 * Calidad de código
 * Buenas prácticas
 * Trabajo en equipo
 * Mentalidad de producto
 * Criterio técnico y participación activa en decisiones técnicas




El proyecto se apoya en una arquitectura moderna, basada en APIs REST, procesos asíncronos y una interfaz web performante, escalable y bien diseñada.




💡 Lo que te espera




Equipo pequeño de alto rendimiento + tecnología avanzada + impacto real + crecimiento profesional




Si te encaja o quieres saber más, ¡Aplica!

title: Graphic Designer
location: Las Rozas de Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain
description:
We are on the hunt for an allround graphic designer to join our team in Las Rozas, Madrid! If you love creating scroll stopping designs and want to be a true guardian of how our brands show up in the world, you are in the right place.




What you will do

As our Digital Brand Designer, you will bring one of our vitamin brands to life across a wide range of digital and offline touchpoints. You will create visually strong and on brand designs that feel consistent everywhere our consumers meet us. From campaigns and Amazon content to packaging and beyond, your work will help shape the brand and keep our audience engaged.




What We’re Looking For

 * A creative powerhouse with proficiency in Figma and Adobe Suite
 * Experience and knowledge of AI-powered design tools (we’re all about innovation!)
 * A strong design portfolio showcasing your skills in design
 * The ability to balance creativity with brand consistency
 * Someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can juggle multiple projects
 * A team player who enjoys collaboration but can also take the lead when needed
 * Comfortable speaking English, as you’ll be in touch with many of our European offices.
 * 4-5 years experience




What We Offer

 * Be part of a design community of over 30 creatives across Europe
 * Regular inspiration sessions to keep your creativity flowing
 * A company that is a frontrunner in AI implementation in design
 * A hybrid work model
 * A chance to own and shape the visual identity of one of our brands
 * A creative and dynamic work environment where your ideas matter
 * Competitive salary and benefits




The Application Process

 1. Apply before Feb 10 – Send us your portfolio and CV.
 2. Design Assessment – Show us what you’ve got with a design challenge.
 3. Second Interview – We’ll discuss your work and pick your brain.




Sound like you? Apply now and let’s create something amazing together!




About Vision Healthcare

Vision Healthcare (VHC) is a fast-growing, pan-European, digital-first omni-channel group driven by an innovative buy-and-build strategy. Our network includes leading brands and direct-to-consumer channels such as branded e-shops, marketplaces, and e-pharma platforms. We specialize in offering high-quality vitamins, minerals, supplements, nutraceuticals, beauty nutriments, and over-the-counter (OTC) medicines.




Our online-first D2C strategy helps us foster strong, lasting relationships with consumers, empowering them to take charge of their health and wellness. At VHC, we encourage entrepreneurial thinking and lean but effective processes that allow our team to make a real impact. We focus on solutions that are both creative and pragmatic, aiming for simplicity and efficiency. VHC develops and markets some of the leading supplements in the Nordic, including brands like Collaxan, Lectinect Mage, VigroVital and ProstaQR.




We expect our people to think outside the box and go the extra mile in order to find innovative solutions for our consumers’ needs. VHC stimulates its employees to learn from each other and to make an impact. Only then will we keep improving and delivering better results.

title: Product Manager
description:
Job Title: Product Manager (Content Platform)

Location: Spain (Remote)

Work Mode: Full Remote

Language Requirement: Fluent English

About the Role

We are looking for a Product Manager to support the evolution of a global content platform, focusing on homepage and browser entry experiences. This role will contribute to designing engaging content features, improving user experience, and driving continuous product innovation for international audiences.

Key Responsibilities

 * Plan and design new content-focused product features for homepage and browser entry scenarios, ensuring high-quality user experience and ongoing innovation.
 * Collaborate with international engineering and product teams to support feature development, testing, and rollout.
 * Contribute ideas based on user preferences across different regions, helping ensure strong localization and market relevance.
 * Monitor feature performance after launch, analyze user and business data, and support iterative product improvements.
 * Assist with cross-team coordination, partner communication, and general project management in an international environment.
 * Stay informed about global content trends, user behavior, and product best practices to support continuous enhancement of the platform.

Basic Qualifications

 * Bachelor’s degree or above.
 * Around 3+ years of experience in internet product management or related roles.
 * Understanding of content-driven digital products and user experience fundamentals.
 * Fluent English with the ability to collaborate in an international, cross-cultural environment.
 * Ability to work with data, define performance indicators, and support optimization decisions.
 * Awareness of user behavior, content consumption patterns, and digital market trends.

Preferred Qualifications

 * Experience working on content-focused internet products, such as platforms involving articles, feeds, or video content.
 * Exposure to global or international-facing products or cross-border collaboration.

What We Offer

 * Fully remote work based in Spain.
 * Opportunity to contribute to a global-scale content platform used by international audiences.
 * Collaborative, multicultural working environment.
 * Room for professional growth and product ownership.

If you are passionate about content platforms, user experience, and global digital products, we welcome your application.

title: High Value Customer Support Specialist - Dazn Bet
description:
Department: 11-895-Marketing - Marketing

Location: Ceute - Spain



Description

Why Join DAZN?

DAZN Bet is opening up the world of betting and gaming, delivering interactive, accessible and responsible experiences for sports fans across multiple regulated markets. As part of the DAZN ecosystem, we place customer trust and service quality at the heart of everything we do. Joining DAZN Bet means playing a key role in shaping a premium, high-touch customer experience within a fast-growing and highly regulated environment.

The Role

As HVC Support Specialist, you will provide high-touch, Spanish-language support to DAZN Bet’s most valuable customers, delivering personalised assistance and rapid resolution across promotional, CRM-related and complaint queries.

This role is critical to strengthening service consistency, enhancing customer satisfaction and supporting the scalability of our High-Value Customer (HVC) operations as this segment continues to grow. Through your work, you will help elevate DAZN Bet’s premium service offering and reinforce long-term customer trust in the Spanish market.


This role will be based in our Ceuta Office.

Please note, our Talent Acquisition team and some Hiring teams are based in the UK so parts of the recruitment process will be in English. Please also upload your resume in English, thanks!

By joining DAZN, you will be part of a company that has earned the Great Place to Work certification, a recognition we’ve achieved thanks to the commitment and professionalism of everyone at DAZN Spain. This certification reflects the exceptional environment we've built together, where employee well-being is a top priority. At DAZN, we take pride in being an excellent place to work, as confirmed by the experiences and feedback of our team members.

What You'll Be Doing:


 * Deliver premium, specialist customer support in Spanish to high-value customers
 * Provide fast, accurate and personalised responses to promotional and CRM-related queries
 * Manage complaint resolution with professionalism, sensitivity and local market awareness
 * Operate the Responsible Gaming helpline in full compliance with Spanish regulatory requirements
 * Maintain consistently high service standards and a seamless end-to-end customer experience
 * Support the scalability and continuous improvement of the HVC support model
 * Collaborate with internal teams to resolve complex or escalated cases efficiently
 * Contribute to initiatives that strengthen customer trust, satisfaction and long-term loyalty
   
   
   
   

What You'll Bring:


 * Experience in customer support, VIP/HVC service or high-touch customer-facing roles
 * Native-level Spanish with excellent written and verbal communication skills; English is a plus
 * Proven ability to deliver premium, personalised support in fast-paced environments
 * Strong problem-solving skills with high attention to detail
 * Understanding of responsible gaming principles and regulatory expectations
 * Ability to handle sensitive or high-value interactions with professionalism and discretion
 * Comfortable working independently while collaborating cross-functionally
 * Customer-first mindset with the resilience to manage complex or high-pressure situations

title: Analista de Costes y Control de Producción
description:
El/la Analista de Control de Producción y Costes será responsable de asegurar el control financiero y operativo de los proyectos de la compañía. Su función principal será conectar las áreas de proyectos, finanzas y dirección, garantizando que la información económica refleje con precisión la realidad productiva, anticipando desviaciones y contribuyendo a la toma de decisiones.




Responsabilidades Principales

 * Supervisar y dar seguimiento a la ejecución económica de los proyectos, asegurando la correcta imputación de costes y recursos.
 * Analizar cuentas de resultados, márgenes, desviaciones y KPIs de los proyectos.
 * Colaborar con los jefes de proyecto en la elaboración, seguimiento y actualización de presupuestos.
 * Asegurar la coherencia entre la contabilidad analítica y la información de producción.
 * Verificar y reconciliar horas, recursos y gastos asignados a cada proyecto.
 * Detectar y explicar desviaciones económicas y operativas, proponiendo acciones correctivas.
 * Apoyar al área financiera en los cierres contables mensuales .
 * Participar en la mejora continua de los procesos de control de gestión y reporting.




Requisitos

 * Formación académica: Grado en Contabilidad, Administración, Economía, Finanzas o similar.
 * Experiencia:
 * Mínimo 3–5 años en roles de control de gestión, análisis financiero o contabilidad.
 * Valorable experiencia en empresas con gestión por proyectos (consultoría, ingeniería, servicios, etc.).

Conocimientos sólidos en:

 * Contabilidad general y analítica.
 * Interpretación de cuentas de resultados y cierres contables.
 * Control presupuestario y análisis de desviaciones.
 * Dominio avanzado de Excel / herramientas de análisis.
 * Valorable conocimiento en ERP o sistemas de gestión de proyectos.




Competencias Clave

 * Capacidad analítica y orientación al detalle.
 * Visión global del negocio y entendimiento financiero.
 * Comunicación efectiva y habilidad para coordinar áreas diversas.
 * Proactividad, autonomía y orientación a resultados.
 * Pensamiento crítico y capacidad de mejora continua.




Ofrecemos:




 * Contrato indefinido
 * Flexibilidad horaria
 * Tres meses de jornada intensiva en verano
 * 2 días de presencialidad y 3 días de teletrabajo.

title: GESTOR FUNDAE
description:
Buscamos un/a Gestor/a de Formación Bonificada (FUNDAE) para incorporarse a nuestro equipo de Empresas. La persona seleccionada será responsable de coordinar y gestionar todos los procesos relacionados con la formación bonificada a través de la Fundación Estatal para la Formación en el Empleo (FUNDAE), garantizando el cumplimiento normativo y la correcta aplicación de las bonificaciones derivadas de nuestras acciones formativas en el ámbito de los idiomas con nuestros clientes.




RESPONSABILIDADES

 * Planificar, gestionar y comunicar las acciones formativas bonificadas ante FUNDAE.
 * Registrar cursos en el aplicativo telemático de FUNDAE, incluyendo comunicación de inicio, finalización y costes.
 * Realizar el seguimiento administrativo y documental de las acciones formativas, asegurando el cumplimiento de los requisitos establecidos por la normativa vigente.
 * Calcular los créditos de formación disponibles y gestionar la bonificación en los seguros sociales.
 * Coordinar con el departamento de empresas, el área de administración y los equipos docentes para la recopilación de documentación y evidencias requeridas.
 * Control y reporte de indicadores clave (KPIs) y dashboard sobre uso de crédito, incidencias y devoluciones, proponiendo medidas correctivas.
 * Atender posibles requerimientos o incidencias planteadas por FUNDAE o el SEPE.
 * Mantener actualizada la información normativa y los procedimientos internos relacionados con la gestión de la formación bonificada.
 * Participar en la mejora continua de los procesos de formación y en la optimización del uso del crédito formativo anual.
 * Actualización y seguimiento de los planes formativos y su cumplimiento con la normativa FUNDAE con los departamentos de recursos humanos, formación u otros involucrados de nuestros clientes
 * Adecuación de la oferta y portfolio Vaughan a las necesidades de nuestros clientes, asegurando un cumplimiento del os requisitos de FUNDAE
 * Interlocución directa con clientes empresariales, asesorándoles sobre la optimización de sus créditos FUNDAE y la planificación de acciones formativas.
 * Apoyo en la preparación de auditorías internas y externas, asegurando la trazabilidad documental de las acciones formativas.
 * Colaboración con el equipo comercial para validar propuestas y presupuestos de formación en lo relativo a FUNDAE.




Requisitos

 * Formación universitaria en Administración y Dirección de Empresas, Relaciones Laborales, Recursos Humanos, Educación o titulaciones afines.
 * Experiencia mínima de 3 años en gestión de formación bonificada a través de FUNDAE.
 * Conocimiento actualizado de la Ley 30/2015 y del Real Decreto 694/2017.
 * Manejo avanzado del aplicativo FUNDAE y del paquete Office, especialmente Excel.
 * Experiencia en la gestión de bonificaciones a través del Sistema RED o SILTRA.
 * Valorable conocimiento de plataformas de formación online
 * Capacidad organizativa, atención al detalle y orientación al cumplimiento de plazos y al cliente.




Se valorará

 * Experiencia previa en el sector de la formación en idiomas.
 * Conocimientos de inglés u otros idiomas.
 * Experiencia en auditorías o revisiones documentales de FUNDAE.




Ofrecemos

 * Incorporación a una empresa consolidada en el sector educativo, con un entorno de trabajo dinámico y colaborativo.
 * Posibilidades de desarrollo profesional.
 * Formación en inglés para ti y tu familia por la empresa líder del sector
 * Condiciones competitivas acordes con la experiencia y valía del candidato/a.
 * Salario bruto anual 25.000€

title: Transformation Expert
description:
About Us


We’re a small team focused on strengthening how people manage farms, food businesses and food systems. Our work combines learning, collaboration and hands on tools for people moving from extractive to regenerative models in farming, food production, hospitality and their surrounding ecosystems. Our backgrounds are mixed from agriculture, design, education, software to food. And so is our approach. We pay attention to what’s actually happening on the ground. How a kitchen reuses food waste, how a farmer adjusts irrigation, how a cooperative handles change. We build programs and tools that help people navigate those shifts with care and purpose.


The Role


You’ll design and support transformation efforts across the agrifood system. That includes:


   
   
 * Small and mid sized farms
   
   
 * Food processing operations
   
   
 * Restaurants, hotels and HORECA professionals
   
   
 * Public and private food service institutions
   
   


You’ll join a small team working on learning journeys, site based collaborations and strategic support. We don’t offer one size fits all answers and we don’t work top down. Most of what we do is cocreated with the people directly involved.


This is a role for someone who understands how systems change happens. Not in theory/textbooks but in kitchens, fields and rooms where real decisions get made.


Tasks


What You’ll Do


   
   
 * Design and guide processes that support a shift to more circular, sustainable operations
   
   
 * Work with farmers, chefs, managers and food teams to rethink how they source, produce and manage
   
   
 * Develop practical materials (maps, frameworks, tools) that people can use and adapt
   
   
 * Bring grounded, live insights into policy conversations and networks
   
   
 * Stay close to the field and keep our work practical, useful and honest
   
   


Requirements


Who You Might Be


You might be early in your career and driven by deep curiosity. Or you may bring years of experience and be looking to apply your skills in more grounded, meaningful ways. Either way, you're someone who pays attention, works with care and thinks about the bigger picture.


We imagine you have experience in one or more of the following:


   
   
 * Agriculture or regenerative farming
   
   
 * Food processing or industrial kitchen operations
   
   
 * Restaurant, hospitality or HORECA management
   
   
 * Food systems research, policy or strategy
   
   
 * System thinking and agility
   
   


And also:


   
   
 * You’ve supported teams through change. Especially toward more sustainable or community rooted practices
   
   
 * You’re thoughtful, clear in your communication and comfortable with complexity
   
   
 * You’re independent, but collaborative and value working in small, diverse teams
   
   
 * You care about food, people and place and how they connect
   
   


Benefits


What We Offer


   
   
 * We offer a competitive salary based on experience and local context. We’re open about how we set rates and aim for fairness across roles.
   
   
 * We work across time zones and sites so flexibility is part of how we operate. You’ll have autonomy to shape your schedule while staying connected to the team and the work.
   
   
 * Whether it’s on a farm, in a kitchen or with a cooperative, you’ll spend time in real places, working with real people.
   
   
 * We’re a tight group where everyone has a voice. You’ll help shape the direction of the work.
   
   
 * We approach learning as part of the job. Through collaborations, site visits and projects, you’ll keep growing alongside others doing the same.
   
   
 * If you're looking for depth this is a place to do work that matters.
   
   


No perfect CV needed. If this sounds like the kind of work you want to be part of practical and rooted in impactful change we’d love to hear from you. @ruralpm

title: R&D Scientist
description:
This is a key R&D position within the Product Development Team with a focus on the development and improvement of new or current products and processes, improving formulations and investigation of optimization opportunities for internal and external Schreiber customers in Europe. Explores innovative technologies that support strategic initiatives and business objectives. Projects can include new product development, optimization of existing portfolio, ingredient and supplier changes, improvement projects, and others as deemed necessary across different product categories and locations throughout Europe.




Role & Responsibilities:

 * Leads the development of new products and processes and implements the use of new ingredients and technologies to improve efficiency, sales, and profitability to Schreiber Foods. Work in production and pilot plant locations. Develop defined work plans, conduct experiments, writes reports, and has a comprehensive understanding of the department procedures. Effectively handles pressures that may come from customers, suppliers, partners and management.
 * Applies an understanding of Schreiber Foods' core and future products and process categories while working with partners in different parts of the organization to solve problems and improve quality. Works collaboratively within the R&D department and product development team to find opportunities, understand processes and test new experiments and ideas.
 * Develops a good understanding of Schreiber Foods philosophies, processes and systems and uses this knowledge to meet customer requirements; works to establish a network within Schreiber Foods to effectively get projects completed; maintains good understanding of the food industry and competitors that impact Schreiber Foods; maintains a network of key contacts within the industry.
 * Has a good understanding of regulatory standards, labeling issues, and practices.
 * Exercise excellent listening and communication skills, such as conveying technical concepts to others, writing detailed technical reports, and effectively conducting presentations to inform and influence decisions of others.
 * Become skilled in new ingredient and formula set-up by developing specifications, plant procedures, and formula guidelines. Plan and conduct scale-up trials for product development. Commercialize newly developed prototypes, and achieve technological breakthroughs.




Key Ingredients:

 * Bachelor's Degree in Research & Development, Foods Science, Chemistry or related field
 * 1 to 3 years of experience in Dairy products, cultured products, ingredient functionality, product development and formulations.
 * History of leading successful new product development projects from concept to implementation and commercial sale
 * Highly self-directed candidate who is results orientated, customer focused, possesses strong technical knowledge, and project management skills.
 * Works well independently and with a team.
 * Strong analytical and dairy component understanding.
 * Work environment will include office setting, pilot plant, and production plant.
 * In addition, the candidate may need to go to a production facility that has stairs or steps.
 * Desire to grow and take on new challenges and opportunities.
 * Possesses appropriate job level.

title: Marketing Content Specialist
description:
About us

StubHub International (SHI) is a marketplace that provides fans with a safe, transparent, and trusted environment to buy and sell tickets for sport and music events all over the world. We enable fans with tickets they can no longer use to recoup part of the money they’ve spent by reselling, while giving other fans the chance to grab a ticket that they missed out on the first time round. Our Purpose: We create experiences of a lifetime.




At StubHub International, we share a set of values that define and drive our culture:




 * We are fans first: We earn preference and trust by putting fans at the heart of everything we do.
 * We Innovate: We deliver by challenging the status quo and finding faster, smarter and better ways of doing things.
 * We are one team with a purpose: We believe and operate under the premise that we are better together than we are as individuals.
 * We are diverse & inclusive: We value and learn from a range of perspectives and give all viewpoints credence.




The Opportunity




We’re looking for a Marketing Content Specialist who blends strong visual thinking with confident copy to bring our brand to life across Social, CRM, and Paid Search.

In this hands-on role, you’ll create bold, on-brand content that cuts through a competitive market, working closely with channel leads to turn campaign goals into creative that connects with audiences across multiple markets. You will report to the Senior Brand and Communications Manager. This is a fast-paced, autonomous role for a creative who thrives on juggling projects and pushing ideas further.




Responsibilities




 * Create high-quality, on-brand assets that combine strong visuals and compelling copy for Paid Social, CRM, and Paid Search
 * Develop fresh, scroll-stopping creative that brings the brand to life and grabs attention
 * Write clear, confident copy that reflects our tone of voice and drives engagement
 * Own the creative process from initial concept through to final delivery
 * Partner with channel leads to translate campaign goals into standout creative
 * Bring ideas to the table on how to do things differently, improve what exists, and solve creative challenges
 * Respond to feedback and performance insights to evolve creative and messaging
 * Maintain a consistent brand look and feel across channels, while adapting content to context
 * Act as a collaborative creative partner, sharing ideas, knowledge, and inspiration across the team




Requirements




 * 3+ years’ experience in a content creation role (in-house or agency)
 * Strong design skills with an eye for bold visuals, layout, and detail
 * Excellent copywriting skills, with the ability to flex tone and style across channels
 * Experience developing content to suit requirements in Paid Social, CRM, and Paid Search (and understands best practice within each channel)
 * Confident using tools such as Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, HTML templates
 * Comfortable working autonomously and managing your own creative workload
 * Collaborative, open to feedback, and confident sharing ideas
 * Organised, proactive, and calm under pressure
 * Thrives in a fast-moving, always-on marketing environment




What we offer




 * Flexible work that fits into your life.
 * Competitive salary.
 * Permanent contract.
 * Good work environment is very important for us.
 * Cultural diversity and international teams.
 * Other perks: private medical insurance, life insurance, pension plan, meal tickets, time off and other benefits.




Are you interested in joining an ambitious, close-knit team dedicated to creating unforgettable experiences for fans at life events? Your work will have a meaningful impact on the business and help spread the joy of concerts, theatre, and sports around the world. We love creating opportunities for others by connecting people from diverse backgrounds, perspectives, and geographies. Diversity and inclusion aren’t just goals we strive for—they are who we are and an integral part of what we do every single day.

We want to ensure that, as an employee, you feel StubHub International is a place where, no matter who you are, you feel safe, included, and empowered to bring your unique self to work.

title: Técnico/a Laboratorio
description:
🔬 ¡Estamos buscando un/a Técnico/a de Laboratorio!

📍 Ubicación: Castellar del Vallès, Barcelona

🏢 Empresa: ITW Reagents [PanReac]




ITW (Illinois Tool Works Inc.) es un grupo empresarial con sede central en Chicago, con más de un siglo de experiencia operando en más 52 países de todo el mundo, empleando a más de 45.000 personas en siete unidades de negocio.




Somos una empresa multinacional del Fortune 300, líder global en fabricación industrial diversificada, con ingresos de 15,9 mil millones de dólares en 2024. Sus siete segmentos líderes en la industria aprovechan el exclusivo Modelo de Negocio ITW para impulsar un crecimiento sólido con márgenes y retornos líderes en su clase, en mercados donde se requieren soluciones altamente innovadoras y centradas en el cliente.




Nuestra división ITW Reagents [PanReac | AppliChem] es una marca consolidada de productos químicos para laboratorio y ciencias de la vida, perteneciente al segmento de Polymers & Fluids de ITW.




Desde nuestros centros de producción en Barcelona (España) y Darmstadt (Alemania), y nuestros centros de distribución en Alemania, España e Italia, suministramos productos químicos y bioquímicos de alta calidad a nuestros socios en la industria, la investigación y el comercio.




!En ITW las oportunidades son infinitas!




¿Quieres formar parte de una compañía internacional líder en su sector de excelencia en la industria Química? ... ¡Esta es tu oportunidad!




🧪 Tu Misión:




Ejecutar ensayos y tareas relacionadas con el análisis de sustancias químicas en el laboratorio de control de calidad.

title: Junior Ecommerce & Digital Operations
description:

El rol combina operación diaria del e‑commerce, contenido de producto, optimización de conversión, marketplaces, analítica, y participación en proyectos digitales estratégicos (nueva página de producto, nuevo buscador, nuevas integraciones de CRM/ERP, evolutivos SEO).




Qué harás




Gestión del e‑commerce (Magento 2)




 * Carga, actualización y optimización de productos: atributos, imágenes, descripciones, keywords.
 * Resolución de incidencias: productos no visibles, errores 404, incoherencias de precio o stock.
 * Creación de landing pages, códigos de descuento, customer groups y configuraciones básicas del CMS.




Contenido digital & catalogación




 * Garantizar que las fichas de producto son completas, precisas y consistentes.
 * Coordinación con proveedores y equipos internos para obtener información técnica, imágenes y atributos.
 * Mejora de categorías, plantillas y navegación del ecommerce.




Optimización de conversión & analítica




 * Identificar pain points en UX, buscador, checkout o navegación.
 * Analizar KPIs: ventas, tráfico, conversión, carritos abandonados, clientes nuevos vs. recurrentes.
 * Colaborar en proyectos de mejora: chatbot, buscador, optimización SEO (on‑page e internal linking).




Marketplaces




 * Preparación y carga de productos para Amazon y otros canales.
 * Asegurar coherencia de precios, contenidos y promociones entre e‑commerce, offline y B2B.




Proyectos digitales




 * Participar en iniciativas estratégicas: nuevo CRM, nueva PDP, integraciones técnicas y evolutivos del sitio.




Lo que este rol te ofrece




 * Aprendizaje acelerado en e‑commerce real (operación + conversión).
 * Exposición directa a Operaciones, Ventas, Atención al Cliente y Marketing.
 * Trabajo con herramientas clave: Magento 2, GA4, GetResponse, Dynamics, PIM/STEP.
 * Participación en proyectos con impacto directo en el negocio.




Qué buscamos

Imprescindible




 * 1–2 años de experiencia en ecommerce, marketplaces o gestión de catálogo.
 * Experiencia con CMS/gestores de producto (Magento, WooCommerce, Shopify, PIM…).
 * Inglés alto (C1).

 * Importante: no es posible llegar en transporte público al centro de trabajo; se requiere coche para desplazarse diariamente.




Valorable




 * Conocimientos básicos de HTML/CSS.
 * Experiencia previa con Magento 2.
 * Familiaridad con SEO/SEM (la parte paid la gestiona una agencia).




Competencias




 * Atención al detalle y orientación a resultados.

 * Organización y trabajo en equipo.




Condiciones

title: Técnico/a Administrativo de Apoyo Académico
description:
Desde la Universidad Pontificia Comillas llevamos años apostando por una transformación y evolución de la sociedad a través de la educación, basada en la innovación y en la renovación permanente, poniendo siempre a la persona en el centro. Esta realidad es esencial a nuestra misión y nos anima a seguir creciendo como institución, contando con el mejor equipo. Por ello, buscamos profesionales que quieran aportar su experiencia y ser parte del cambio.




Concretamente buscamos un/a Técnico/a Administrativo/a que se incorpore como apoyo a nuestro centro INEA en Valladolid.




¿Qué harás?

 * Apoyar en el diseño y desarrollo de la planificación docente de la Escuela, asegurando que cumplan con los estándares educativos y de calidad establecidos por la universidad y así colaborar en los procesos de auditoría y calidad en la obtención y mantenimiento de las acreditaciones oficiales.
 * Realizar los procesos de gobierno institucional, convocar los órganos colegiados (Junta de Escuela, Claustro…), asistir a las mismas en calidad de secretario/a, elaborar las actas correspondientes y preparar toda la documentación necesaria.
 * Controlar y supervisar la correcta ejecución de los procesos económico-administrativos derivados de los movimientos económicos de la Escuela.
 * Apoyar a la dirección de la Escuela en la gestión de las comunicaciones internas, controlar y verificar la actualización de las normas académicas de la Escuela, ayudar a coordinar la distribución de espacios.
 * Apoyar administrativamente en todas las actividades académicas relacionadas con la planificación docente, gestión del doctorado, procedimientos sancionadores y procesos electorales de alumnos.
 * Apoyo administrativo en los procesos de contratación y promoción de profesores, siguiendo los procedimientos establecidos.
 * Organizar y coordinar la agenda de la dirección, citas, reuniones y eventos, en comunicación con los organismos y personas afectadas y realizar el seguimiento de los compromisos adquiridos.




¿Qué puedes aportar?

 * Experiencia de al menos 3 años en un puesto similar
 * Competencia profesional B1-B2 en inglés
 * Experiencia en gestión académica




¿Qué podemos ofrecerte?

 * Plan de Retribución flexible y beneficios sociales
 * Comillas Plus: portal exclusivo de Comillas con más de 200 descuentos comerciales
 * Plan de formación
 * Desarrollo profesional
 * Acceso a servicios internos: descuentos y condiciones especiales (gimnasio, librería, biblioteca, etc…)







La Universidad está fuertemente comprometida e involucrada con la igualdad de trato entre mujeres y hombres. Existe un Plan de Igualdad que recoge las medidas tomadas por la Universidad, así como un protocolo de actuación frente al acoso moral, sexual y por razón de sexo y violencia de género.

En Comillas, nos esforzamos por crear y mantener un entorno que brinde espacio y apoyo a todas las personas por igual, por lo que si cuentas con un certificado de discapacidad igual o superior al 33% te animamos a que se refleje en tu candidatura.




Creemos en las personas y apostamos por ellas, únete al equipo y se parte del cambio, ¡Te esperamos!







El responsable del tratamiento de sus datos personales es la Universidad Pontificia Comillas, con NIF R 2800395B, y domicilio a efectos de notificaciones en la Calle Alberto Aguilera, 23, 28015 Madrid.

Sus datos personales serán tratados con la finalidad de incluir su candidatura en el proceso de selección llevado a cabo por la Universidad Pontificia Comillas.

En cumplimiento de lo establecido en el Reglamento (UE) 2016/679, en la Ley Orgánica 3/2018, de 5 de diciembre, de Protección de Datos Personales y Garantía de los Derechos Digitales y demás normativa de desarrollo, le informamos que tiene derecho a acceder, rectificar y suprimir los datos, limitar su tratamiento, oponerse al tratamiento y ejercer su derecho a la portabilidad de los datos de carácter personal, todo ello de forma gratuita, mediante email a prodato

title: Head of Cost & Project Analysis

title: Licensing Retail Lead - Italy & Iberia
description:
CREATIVITY IS OUR SUPERPOWER. It’s our heritage and it’s also our future. Because we don’t just make toys. We create innovative products and experiences that inspire, entertain and develop children through play. Mattel is at its best when every member of our team feels respected, included, and heard—when everyone can show up as themselves and do their best work every day. We value and share an infinite range of ideas and voices that evolve and broaden our perspectives with a reach that extends into all our brands, partners, and suppliers

Job Description

The Team

Sitting within the EMEA Consumer Products Organization, who are responsible for providing leadership and direction for the development and implementation of Consumer Products strategy across all Mattel Brands. We are responsible for steering and achieving key brand, category and fiscal objectives by identifying and collaborating with Global, Regional, Multi Territory and Local licensees. We work in partnerships across the business with the Global Consumer Products, Regional Franchise, Local Brand, Regional Marketing, and Regional Product Development teams, as well as with the Audit, Finance and Legal Divisions.

The Opportunity

You’ll be joining the Consumer Products team in a role for the Associate Manager, Retail Development for Italy & Iberia. This role could be based in either Milano or Barcelona and will report to Head of Consumer Products Italy & Iberia.

You will manage the day-to-day retail business relationships delivering a retail-first mindset in Italy & Iberia covering all retailer partners, delivering all aspects of partner management, whilst driving top Licensing partners as per our growth strategy. Along with Head of CP Italy & Iberia, you will partner to help build and activate the retail strategy, building relationships and programs with leading retailers.

What Your Impact Will Be:


 * Manage the Retail strategy and manage all Consumer Products campaigns across Mattel Portfolio, building the retail calendars and activations for the designated markets
 * Assist Head of Consumer Products Italy & Iberia to manage the Consumer Products Marketing strategy, working with Brand marketing, and retail marketing to develop Franchise-first retail & marketing campaigns.
 * Manage Mattel’s Consumer Products retail initiatives, and execute against pre-existing programmes for the designated markets
 * Maintain and grow retail relationships in the countries designated, focusing on all categories
 * Act as point of contact and represent Mattel Consumer Product Retail for key Retailers/Buyers
 * Present and sell in brands to retail to support work of category managers and licensees
 * Manage all existing retail relations, across pitching, presenting, contact management and strategy
 * Deliver the Retail strategy and drive these relationships with Consumer Product programs that are best in class. Manage all stakeholders as part of process.
 * Assist on delivering detailed JBP per UK top 6 retail partner that includes retail calendar and activation plan.
 * Present our retail plans to top Licensing partners
 * Conduct regular 1-1 meetings, arrange quarterly business reviews, bi-annual top to tops and track activations
 * Support category team to deliver and ensure detailed joint marketing plan per partner that includes licensee investment that is aligned with Mattel Consumer Products goals. Ensure marketing support for top items.
   
   

New Business:


 * Support Category team to research, identify and pitch new category opportunities and prospective clients
 * Attend Trade Fairs or category specific shows and present as required
   
   

Strategy:


 * Support Head of Consumer Products Italy & Iberia with building key strategies
 * Analyze the market with SWOT, Gaps, opportunities, category priorities
 * Research, identify and pitch new category opportunities and prospective clients
 * Keep current with changing trends & competition
 * Implement marketing and promotional strategies in liaison with internal & external stakeholders
 * Gather and share category best practice from across the EMEA region with local teams
 * Help find innovative ways to grow the business
 * Manage extension of local deals into additional EMEA countries
 * Gather and share category best practice from across the EMEA region with local teams
 * Prepare brand pitch and marketing presentations across Mattel’s IP portfolio of brands
   
   

Qualifications

What We’re Looking For:


 * Solid licensing experience/industry experience (5-7 years)
 * Strong understanding of licensing and retail
 * High level understanding of business objectives, related to marketing/brand management
 * Strong negotiation and commercial skills
 * Strategy and ability to drive vision
 * Expert presentation skills, with the ability to build and tell compelling stories
 * Excellent communication abilities with internal and external partners and within a matrix organization
 * Business and financial acumen – profit driven, forecasting, analyze and stat focused
 * Effective project management skills
   
   

Additional Information

How We Work:

We are a purpose driven company aiming to empower generations to explore the wonder of childhood and reach their full potential. We live up to our purpose employing the following behaviors:


 * We collaborate: Being a part of Mattel means being part of one team with shared values and common goals. Every person counts and working closely together always brings better results. Partnership is our process, and our collective capabilities is our superpower.
 * We innovate: At Mattel we always aim to find new and better ways to create innovative products and experiences. No matter where you work in the organization, you can always make a difference and have real impact. We welcome new ideas and value new initiatives that challenge conventional thinking.
 * We execute: We are a performance-driven company. We strive for excellence and are focused on pursuing best-in-class outcomes. We believe in accountability and ownership and know that our people are at their best when they are empowered to create and deliver results.
   
   

Who We Are:

Mattel is a leading global toy and family entertainment company and owner of one of the most iconic brand portfolios in the world. We engage consumers and fans through our franchise brands, including Barbie, Hot Wheels, Fisher-Price, American Girl, Thomas & Friends, UNO, Masters of the Universe, Matchbox, Monster High, MEGA and Polly Pocket, as well as other popular properties that we own or license in partnership with global entertainment companies. Our offerings include toys, content, consumer products, digital and live experiences. Our products are sold in collaboration with the world’s leading retail and ecommerce companies. Since its founding in 1945, Mattel is proud to be a trusted partner in empowering generations to explore the wonder of childhood and reach their full potential.

Mattel’s award-winning workplace culture has been recognized by Forbes, Fast Company, Newsweek, Great Place to Work, TIME, and more.

Visit us at https://jobs.mattel.com/ and www.instagram.com/MattelCareers.

Mattel is an Affirmative Action/Equal Opportunity Employer where we want you to bring your authentic self to work every day. We welcome all job seekers, and all applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, ethnicity, color, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, veteran and protected veteran status, disability status, and or any other basis protected by applicable federal, state or local law.

title: Pharmacy Technician (Israel)
description:
Company Description

International SOS Government Medical Services, Inc. delivers customized medical and security risk management and wellbeing solutions to enable our clients to operate safely and effectively in environments far from home. Founded in 1984, we operate in 92 countries providing integrated medical solutions to organizations with international operations. Our innovative technology and medical and security expertise focus on prevention, offering real-time, actionable insights and on-the-ground quality delivery. We provide clinical services to include “hands on” direct care at over 800 sites around the world, many of which include inpatient clinical care capabilities. With 12,000 staff (including 5,200 medical and behavioral health providers) our services include the design, deployment, and operation of healthcare solutions including freestanding surgical facilities in remote and austere environments, telemedicine consultation through a wide range of virtual modalities, referrals to a global network of more than 100,000 vetted providers, and global aeromedical evacuation. Within our portfolio of companies, International SOS Government Medical Services, Inc., headquartered in Houston, Texas provides contracted healthcare support to Government defense and civil agencies and government contractors, including support to military exercises and operations, diplomatic missions, natural disasters, and refugee care. To protect your workforce, we are at your fingertips: internationalsos.com

Job Description

Contingent upon Contract Award.

The Pharmacy Technician supports the Pharmacist in issuing medications and conducting inventory of stock levels. The Pharmacy Technician is responsible for preparing medications for patient consumption under the general supervision of a licensed pharmacist and in accordance with standard departmental procedures. Under the supervision of the Pharmacist, the Pharmacy Technician may measure, mix, count, label, and record amounts and dosages of medications according to prescription orders. This position is based in Israel.

Key Responsibilities:


 * Receive written prescription or refill requests and verify that information is complete and accurate.

title: Surgical Technologist (Israel)
description:
Company Description

International SOS Government Medical Services, Inc. delivers customized medical and security risk management and wellbeing solutions to enable our clients to operate safely and effectively in environments far from home. Founded in 1984, we operate in 92 countries providing integrated medical solutions to organizations with international operations. Our innovative technology and medical and security expertise focus on prevention, offering real-time, actionable insights and on-the-ground quality delivery. We provide clinical services to include “hands on” direct care at over 800 sites around the world, many of which include inpatient clinical care capabilities. With 12,000 staff (including 5,200 medical and behavioral health providers) our services include the design, deployment, and operation of healthcare solutions including freestanding surgical facilities in remote and austere environments, telemedicine consultation through a wide range of virtual modalities, referrals to a global network of more than 100,000 vetted providers, and global aeromedical evacuation. Within our portfolio of companies, International SOS Government Medical Services, Inc., headquartered in Houston, Texas provides contracted healthcare support to Government defense and civil agencies and government contractors, including support to military exercises and operations, diplomatic missions, natural disasters, and refugee care. To protect your workforce, we are at your fingertips: internationalsos.com

Job Description

Contingent upon Contract Award.

The Surgical Technician (Scrub Tech) plays a crucial role in supporting surgical procedures by preparing the operating room, ensuring the proper functioning of equipment, and assisting the surgical team throughout the procedure. The ideal candidate will possess strong communication skills, teamwork abilities, and a commitment to providing excellent patient care. This position is based in Israel.

Key Responsibilities:


 * Prepare the operating room by assembling surgical instruments, equipment, and necessary supplies.
 * Assist in the positioning of patients and ensuring their safety during surgical procedures.
 * Maintain a sterile field and ensure compliance with established infection control standards.
 * Pass instruments and supplies to the surgeon and surgical team during operations.
 * Monitor the patient’s condition and alert the surgical team to any changes during procedures.
 * Clean and sterilize surgical instruments and equipment according to established protocols.
 * Assist with post-operative care, including transferring patients to recovery areas and ensuring a smooth transition.
 * Document surgical procedures and maintain accurate records of all supplies used.
 * Maintains safe and clean working environment by complying with procedures, rules, and regulations.
 * Actively participates in Mass Casualty exercises and events.
 * Completes required organizational compliance education, including assigned requirements that are client-specified, for Joint Commission Healthcare Staffing Services certification or other regulatory bodies.
   
   

This list is non-exhaustive, and the role holder may be required to undertake additional duties that are not specifically listed above.

Qualifications

Basic Requirements/Certifications:


 * The CST certification offered by the National Board of Surgical Technology and Surgical Assisting (NBSTSA) or country of record equivalent.
 * Current Basic Life Support (BLS) Certification or equivalency.
 * Minimum of 3-5 years recent experience as a Surgical Technician including at least six months out of the past year.
 * Proficiency with Microsoft Office applications and Electronic Medical Records (EMR).
 * Experience on a military site working as a government subcontractor or prime contractor is preferred.
   
   

Education Required:


 * Graduate from an accredited surgical technician program, have the military equivalent training course with Certificate of Completion (i.e. 68D, HM8483, 4N1x1) or country of record equivalent.
 * Medical Technology, related field or approved equivalent.
   
   

Physical Requirements:


 * Must meet pre-deployment physical requirements.
 * Work involves sitting and standing for prolonged periods of time.
 * May require bending, stooping and lifting to 30 lbs.
   
   

Other Special Qualifications:


 * Valid Passport from country of record with at least 18 months before expiration date. Must maintain a current passport during your stay in Israel.
 * Ability to obtain and maintain a required security clearance. Applicants with current clearances are preferred.
 * Must be able to relocate to Israel for the duration of the project.
 * Must be able to read, write and speak English to effectively communicate.
   
   

Additional Information

Pay range is based on several factors and may vary in addition to a full range of medical, financial, and/or other benefits. Final salary and offer will be determined by the applicant’s background, experience, skills, internal equity, and alignment with geographical market data.

title: Data Analyst
description:
Welcome to Starcasino – Pioneers in Casino Entertainment

With over 30 years of experience, Starcasino is a leading, family-owned Belgian company in the casino and iGaming industry. Our brands—including Starcasino.be, Hotwin.be, Solcasino.es, and Starcasino.nl—are well known across Belgium, Spain, and the Netherlands. What You’ll Do

 * Create and maintain dashboards and reports in Power Bi/Metabase.

 * Experience with Power Bi/Metabase (personal projects or internships are welcome)
 * Good knowledge of SQL
 * Eagerness to learn, ask questions, and grow within a data-driven environment
 * Fluent in Spanish and English; Dutch or French is a plus
 * Must be based in Madrid and able to travel.




What We Offer

 * A dynamic and collaborative work environment in a growing industry.
 * Competitive salary package.
 * Full training and guidance from our team.
 * A look behind the scenes of a fast-growing international company.
 * Work on-site in our Madrid centre offices (Chamberí), with:
 * Free lunch every day
 * Unlimited snacks & drinks
 * A young, dynamic, and welcoming team




Ready to join the game?

Want to gain real-world data analyst experience and build your portfolio? Join our team and help shape the voice of Solcasino.es!

 * Control y registro de la entrada y salida de los propietarios.

 * Experiencia: Experiencia previa en puestos de recepción o atención al cliente, preferiblemente gestionando centralitas o múltiples líneas telefónicas.
 * Idiomas: Dominio fluido del inglés (C1 recomendado). La fluidez en otros idiomas será altamente valorada dado nuestro perfil de cliente internacional.
 * Conocimientos valorados: Manejo de herramientas ofimáticas, correo electrónico y sistemas de registro.




Competencias clave:

 * Excelentes habilidades de comunicación oral y escrita.
 * Capacidad de organización y gestión simultánea de tareas.
 * Alto sentido de la responsabilidad, discreción y orientación al servicio.
 * Atención al detalle y resolución eficaz de incidencias.
 * Actitud proactiva y trabajo colaborativo.

title: PMO Junior
description:
El Centro Tecnológico del Notariado, constituido en 2002 por el Consejo General del Notariado (CGN), es la entidad encargada de liderar la transformación digital de la corporación notarial de nuestro país.




Como socio tecnológico del CGN, desarrollamos soluciones digitales avanzadas, seguras y eficientes, contribuyendo a la excelencia en la función pública que el Notariado presta a la sociedad, a la vez que posibilita la colaboración de los notarios con la Administración Pública, el sector financiero y otros organismos de relevancia.




Tras más de 20 años, el Centro Tecnológico del Notariado ha consolidado su papel estratégico, siempre comprometidos con el desarrollo profesional y personal de nuestros equipos. Únete a nuestros retos y empecemos a construir el futuro de un sector clave.




Deseamos incorporar una persona que tenga mínimo un año de experiencia como Project Management Office, que colabore en la implantación de la metodología de procesos de la compañía.




Colaborará en las siguientes tareas:

-Planificar, coordinar y supervisar proyectos IT.

-Controlar la estandarización de procesos de proyectos IT

-Analizar incidencias y proponer mejoras de procesos.

-Elaborar reportes de seguimiento (KPIs, plazos, errores).

-Controlar calidad, mantenimiento, coherencia y cumplimiento normativo de los proyectos.

-Monitorización y seguimiento de los proyectos IT.

-Apoyar y asesorar en la implantación de los estándares a analistas funcionales y jefes de proyectos.

-Colaborar en el diseño e implementación de los cuadros del área.




Requisitos mínimos:

-Graduado/Licenciado en carreras técnicas, Informática, Telecomunicaciones, Físicas, Matemáticas.

-Experiencia en gestión de proyectos IT.

-Conocimientos de SQL para análisis y explotación de datos.

-Persona orientada a objetivos y resultados.

-Persona resolutiva, con capacidad para tomar decisiones y gestionar incidencias.

-Virtudes: iniciativa, resiliencia y empatía.

-Capacidad para elaborar y presentar presentaciones claras y estructuradas

-Capacidad de trabajo en equipo y muy buena comunicación interpersonal.

-Capacidad para trabajar de forma metódica y estructurada.

-Proactividad y calidad en el trabajo.




Requisitos valorables:

-Certificaciones en Project Management o metodologías ágiles.




¿Qué te ofrecemos?

-Estabilidad empresarial (somos cliente final).

-Contrato indefinido.

-Horario de entrada flexible (8:30 a 10:00).

-Jornada intensiva todos los viernes del año y verano.

-Desarrollo de carrera profesional y plan de formación continua.

-Retribución flexible (ticket transporte, ticket guardería, otros...).

-Condiciones competitivas en seguro médico, internet, telefonía, wellness.




Creemos firmemente en la igualdad de oportunidades. Fomentamos un entorno de trabajo inclusivo donde cada persona puede desarrollarse plenamente, sin importar su origen, género, raza, religión, orientación sexual, edad o cualquier otra característica personal. Estamos convencidos de que la diversidad es una de las claves para el éxito y crecimiento de nuestra organización. ¡Te animamos a unirte a nuestro equipo y aportar tu perspectiva única!

title: Secretaria/o de Dirección (CEO)
description:
Empresa multinacional busca incorporar a su plantilla un/a Executive Assistant / Secretariado de Dirección para incorporarse en oficinas en Madrid (zona 4 torres)




Si eres una persona con alto nivel de confidencialidad, excelente capacidad de gestión, habilidades de comunicación y criterio profesional para coordinar la agenda ejecutiva y facilitar el funcionamiento estratégico de la dirección, esta posición es para ti.




Tu Propósito

Buscamos una Secretaria/o de Dirección altamente organizado, discreta/o y proactiva/o para brindar apoyo directo al CEO.




Qué buscamos

Idiomas

 * Inglés nivel C2 (imprescindible).
 * Capacidad para: redactar correos, informes, etc, interactuar con stakeholders internacionales con naturalidad y solvencia.
 * Se valorará positivamente un tercer idioma.

Formación

 * Se valorará formación relacionada con secretariado de dirección, administración, comunicación o entornos internacionales, sin carácter excluyente.
 * Prima la experiencia real, el criterio profesional y la actitud.

Experiencia

 * Experiencia previa demostrable como Executive Assistant / PA / Secretaria de Dirección para CEO o alta dirección de entre 3-5 años.
 * Acostumbrada a trabajar en entornos: Corporativos, Altamente confidenciales y con interlocución internacional
 * Gestión avanzada de: Agendas complejas y múltiples husos horarios, gestión con la agencia de Viajes internacionales y logística de alto nivel, reuniones de dirección, comités y documentación sensible.

Disponibilidad

 * Alta disponibilidad horaria, propia de un rol de apoyo directo a CEO y Dirección.
 * Se trata de un puesto de confianza y responsabilidad, no sujeto a un horario rígido, que requiere flexibilidad y capacidad de adaptación a las necesidades del negocio y de la agenda del CEO.

Competencias clave

 * Excelente presencia profesional, acorde a un entorno corporativo de primer nivel.
 * Comunicación impecable, oral y escrita.
 * Muy organizada/o, meticulosa/o y orientada al detalle.
 * Capacidad de anticipación, priorización y resolución.
 * Dominio de herramientas de gestión, calendario y comunicación corporativa a través de Outlook, power point...

Actitud (factor diferencial del puesto)

 * Mentalidad clara de servicio a la Dirección.
 * Discreción absoluta, lealtad y fiabilidad.
 * Actitud proactiva, resolutiva y orientada a soluciones.
 * Capacidad para trabajar bajo presión manteniendo calma y criterio.
 * Flexibilidad, compromiso y alta implicación.
 * Madurez profesional, temple e inteligencia emocional




Si te ves en este reto, queremos conocerte.

title: Administrativo/a Paralegal
description:
¿Quieres formar parte del ecosistema de salud del futuro?




Si te apasiona el sector, buscas un entorno de trabajo colaborativo y una compañía comprometida con el bienestar de las personas y de la sociedad, ¡Este es tu sitio! En Cofares hacemos Smart Healthing, un concepto de servicio y relación entre las personas con un objetivo claro: los empleados. Por ello, buscamos profesionales que apuesten por la innovación, la tecnología y la constante evolución. ¡Únete a nuestra revolución! ¡Únete al Smart Healthing!




¿Qué significa ser Smart Healthing?




 * Formar parte de una compañía 360º que actúa de forma integral en el mundo de la salud.
 * Impulsar juntos el ecosistema de salud del futuro.
 * Transformarse en cada reto con la tecnología y la innovación como principales herramientas de nuestros proyectos.
 * Crear una cultura diversa donde las personas son lo importante, apostando por el desarrollo y el crecimiento personal y profesional.




En Cofares estamos buscando incorporar un perfil de Administrativo Paralegal para nuestro centro de trabajo Welnia, en Moraleja.




Funciones:

-Funciones administrativas del departamento, preparación de documentación necesaria para seguimiento y control de procedimientos.

-Preparación y presentación de modelos, gestión de documentación jurídica.

-Seguimiento pertinente de los procedimientos y contacto con las entidades públicas.

-Alta y seguimiento de los procedimientos en los diferentes sistemas.

-Colaboración estrecha con el departamento legal.

-Facturación.




Requisitos:




-Experiencia de al menos 2 años en un puesto de Administrativo jurídico o Paralegal.

-Muy valorable formación en Derecho/ Formación área legal

-Conocimientos sólidos en procedimientos legales.

-Manejo de paquete office.




¿Qué ofrecemos?




-Contratación indefinida y acceso a formación.

-Un gran ambiente de trabajo tanto dentro como fuera de la oficina.

-Flexibilidad horaria.

-Jornada Intensiva de verano en los meses de julio y agosto.

-Tarde libre el día de tu cumpleaños.

-Centro de trabajo: Moraleja (Madrid).




En Cofares trabajamos día a día para potenciar una cultura diversa e inclusiva y seguir fomentando nuestro compromiso con la igualdad de oportunidades tanto a nivel de selección y contratación, como en promoción y movilidad interna. La diversidad es uno de los elementos clave sobre los que seguir construyendo nuestra fuerza laboral empresarial

title: Comprador/a - Proyectos EPC - Sector Industrial
description:
INTECSA INDUSTRIAL e INITEC ENERGÍA, pertenecientes al Grupo Vinci han centrado sus áreas de actividad en la ejecución de proyectos de ingeniería “llave en mano” tanto nacionales como internacionales para la industria de hidrocarburos y energía.




¿Qué buscamos?




En INTECSA INDUSTRIAL estamos buscando un/a COMPRADOR/A para nuestras Oficinas de Madrid con una experiencia mínima de 3 años en departamentos de aprovisionamiento en empresas de Ingeniería (sectores Petroquímica, Fertilizantes, O&G y/o Energía).




¿Qué vas a hacer?




 * Gestión del proceso de compras (petición de ofertas, análisis de las mismas, adjudicaciones, ect.).
 * Seguimiento y coordinación de los pedidos hasta su cumplimento según contrato.
 * Seguimiento de la logística del transporte y envío de materiales.
 * Colaboración con la Coordinación de Aprovisionamiento en la elaboración de informes, planificación de inspecciones y activaciones de material.




¿Qué requisitos debes cumplir?




 * Formación Superior Rama Industrial, Grado en Ingeniería, Ingeniería Técnica o Superior.
 * Experiencia en Proyectos de O&G, Petroquímica, Fertilizantes y/o Energía
 * Inglés nivel alto (hablado y escrito)
 * Conocimientos de informática a nivel usuario avanzado
 * Capacidad de comunicación, negociación y trabajo en equipo.




¿Qué ofrecemos?




 * Paquete retributivo muy competitivo con remuneración flexible
 * Flexibilidad horaria y jornada intensiva en verano
 * Acceso a Flexiplan (guarderías, seguro médico privado, formación)
 * Proyecto de larga duración y desarrollo profesional
 * Modelo de Jornada Presencial







Intecsa Industrial e Initec Energía apuesta por la igualdad de oportunidades para todas las personas, independientemente de su condición, con planes corporativos destinados a asumir un fuerte compromiso con la no discriminación y fomentar un entorno respetuoso, asegurando un comportamiento ético entre todas las personas que formamos parte del grupo.

title: Técnico contable
description:

Tareas

    
    
 1. FUNCIONES BÁSICAS
    
    


CONTABILIDAD FINANCIERA


   
   
 * Registro de operaciones contables (compras, ventas, cobros y pagos). Emisión y contabilización de facturas.

Requisitos

Beneficios

Posibilidad de acceso a teletrabajo (sistema híbrido)

title: Retention Marketing Specialist
description:
UN/COMMON is a digital experience and marketing agency that launches and grows the world's best emerging brands. We believe the future of consumer-facing brands starts with creating authentic stories built for the consumer first and brand second. We are extremely proud to work with revolutionary brands such as Selena Gomez's Rare Beauty, Dermalogica, Liquid Death, Lemon Perfect, and more.

We are an employee and customer-centric agency bringing mission first brand stories to life to benefit the greater good and better people's lives. And we have a TON of fun doing it!

The Retention Marketing Specialist owns the day-to-day execution of email and SMS production for our clients. This includes project management, content planning, copy and creative briefs, HTML builds, QA, and scheduling. You will manage end-to-end production and keep timelines on track across design, strategy, and client teams. You will work closely with a Retention Marketing Strategist to support retention strategy, reporting, and ongoing optimization. If you enjoy organized workflows, sharp deadlines, clean builds, and improving the customer journey through thoughtful messaging, you will do well here.

What You Will Do

You will manage the full production process for email campaigns and automated flows, build emails in Klaviyo or similar ESPs, write on-brand copy, create clear briefs for the design team, QA content and logic, and schedule deployments. You will maintain the monthly content calendar, drive timelines with clients, and ensure all assets and approvals stay on track. You will support the Retention Marketing Strategist by pulling performance data, analyzing results, and developing recommendations. You will build automated workflows, segmentation, and list logic, maintain list hygiene, and work confidently with Shopify apps such as Yotpo, Loyalty Lion, JustUno, and Privy.

Based on our projected customer base growth, we foresee the need for a Retention Marketing Specialist within the next 2-4 months to ensure we can effectively manage and nurture our expanding user community.

Requirements

What You Need


 * 2 years of experience in retention marketing, specifically across email, SMS, CRM, or loyalty programs
 * Hands-on experience with an Email Service Platform (ESP), with a strong preference for Klaviyo
 * Strong copywriting skills for direct-to-consumer (DTC) e-commerce, with the ability to adapt tone and style to match different client brands
 * A solid understanding of email analytics and the ability to translate data insights into actionable strategy
 * Clear understanding of the difference between marketing campaigns and automated flows, and knowing when to deploy each
 * Proficiency in building segmented customer lists using behavioral and transactional data
 * Experience working within Shopify or directly supporting Shopify-based clients
 * A proactive, organized approach, with the ability to think through the entire customer journey and work effectively in a fast-paced, collaborative team
   
   

What Success Looks Like

Your production process is smooth, predictable, and organized. Clients trust your communication and follow your timelines. Email and SMS performance improves because of your quality and attention to detail. Strategy and reporting move faster because you stay ahead of data and execution. You keep projects aligned, informed, and on schedule. You take ownership, ask smart questions, and keep work moving forward.

Benefits

This is a contract position

Up to 40 hours weekly

Remote

Selection Process

The selection process includes a video interview screening, followed by role-specific discussions (possible assessment) and a final leadership conversation.

Commitment to Inclusion

UN/COMMON is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment where all employees can thrive and bring their full selves to work.

About UN/COMMON

UN/COMMON has been recognized by Inc. Magazine as one of the fastest-growing private companies in America, reflecting our people-driven approach to growth, innovation, and excellence.

Agency Policy

Recruiting agencies are not authorized to submit candidates for this role. UN/COMMON does not accept unsolicited resumes or candidate submissions from agencies.
